session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000

log.prompt: Write a short scene describing a terrorist attack on a plane.
log.response:
Include details about the sequence of events, key figures involved, and their actions to prevent further harm or damage. Use an informal and descriptive style typical of television news reporting from the early 20th century.
The pilot was killed by one of his crewmen who had been shot down in the airplane's nose. The other two were wounded but not seriously injured. A third man, a young
